response.original_title: UFC Fight Night 272: Moicano vs. Duncan
response.overview: UFC Fight Night 272: Moicano vs. Duncan (also known as UFC Fight Night:  Moicano vs. Duncan and UFC Vegas 115) was a mixed martial arts event produced by the Ultimate Fighting Championship that took place on April 4, 2026, at the Meta Apex in Enterprise, Nevada, part of the Las Vegas Valley, United States.
response.title: UFC Fight Night 272: Moicano vs. Duncan
